title: #Stay-at-home #It-is-not-that-simple
author: Domina Petric
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: It is not that simple to say: Stay at home! People in self-isolation, especially the elderly that might be isolated for a very long time, must be supplied with groceries and vital medications by caregivers (family members, volunteers or other caregivers insured by the government). Isolation strategies must be perfectly well paced to prevent transmission of the virus on the one hand, and on the other hand, isolation strategies must be stopped at the right time to prevent mental and physical health consequences.
